params_frozen.v6a_revised_design_provenance: Cache-enabled cheap experiment (post-v5 FAIL). Original v6a (mega-cap exclusion against SPY benchmark, top-50 fixed, Bonferroni n=12) was REJECTED by zen + perplexity adversarial review 2026-05-01 PM as mathematically self-defeating: SPY benchmark in 2024-2025 mega-cap rally vs non-mega-cap subset = structural -35% gap before any alpha test (zen ★★★). Five mitigations adopted in v6a-revised: (1) MDY benchmark (cap-matched, NOT SPY); (2) percentile-based universe filter (top-10% drop, exogenous to observed regime); (3) retrain Lasso on non-mega-cap train pool only (eliminates distribution mismatch perplexity ★★★); (4) threshold |t|≥3.5 (Romano-Wolf m≈50, NOT simple Bonferroni n=12); (5) EXPLORATORY framing — PASS requires fresh-OOS walk-forward 2026-05-01+ confirmation before any capital escalation.
params_frozen.class_rationale: Reopens CLOSED 5/5 alt_data_screener_search_2026_04_30 class with 6th hypothesis. v1-v5 all FAIL on full universe with various selection rules (top-30 / decile L/S / long-only). v6a-revised tests: does retrained Lasso on non-mega-cap subset (top-10% mkt-cap excluded) generate alpha vs cap-matched benchmark MDY? Hypothesis is post-hoc relative to v5 sub-period diagnostic — frame as exploratory.
params_frozen.class_bonferroni: In-class n=6 → naive |t|≥2.64. PROGRAM-LEVEL across all classes on burnt holdout: 11 prior + this v6a = n=12 → naive |t|≥2.85. Adversarial review (perplexity ★★★) flagged true effective m≈50 (incl preprocessing variants, model class iterations, selection rule variants) → Romano-Wolf adjustment → |t|≥3.5 PRIMARY. v6a-revised USES |t|≥3.5 NOT naive Bonferroni.
params_frozen.harking_caveat_explicit: v6a-revised is post-hoc designed against v5's regime-stratification finding (long-leg matched +20.6%/y but SPY +60-70%/y crushed it via 2024-25 mega-cap rally). Per Kerr 1998 + Simmons et al. 2011 this is hypothesis-mining on burnt holdout. Five mitigations: exogenous percentile (NOT arbitrary count), Lasso retrain on subset (eliminates training-set contamination), MDY cap-matched benchmark (eliminates structural gap), Romano-Wolf threshold (m≈50), EXPLORATORY frame requiring fresh-OOS confirmation.
params_frozen.exploratory_frame: v6a-revised treats all results as HYPOTHESIS GENERATION, not hypothesis testing. PASS verdict at |t|≥3.5 (or stretch 4.0) triggers MANDATORY prospective walk-forward replication on data accruing 2026-05-01+ at unadjusted p<0.05 before any escalation. Capital deploy OFF-TABLE on this burnt holdout regardless of any v6a-revised outcome.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: zen + perplexity 2026-05-01 PM reviewed original v6a (mega-cap exclusion top-50, SPY benchmark, Bonferroni n=12). zen ★★★: SPY benchmark + non-mega-cap subset = structural −35% gap, mathematically self-defeating. perplexity ★★★: HARKing irreducible, top-50 specification mining, cache reuse distribution mismatch, m≈50 underadjusted. Both REJECT original. Five mitigations adopted as listed in design memo.
params_frozen.architecture: single_global_lasso (target_transform='rank') with retrained Lasso on non-mega-cap train pool
params_frozen.architecture_rationale: Lasso class UNCHANGED from v3-v5. Target rank-transform UNCHANGED. ONE variable changes: training universe (full → non-mega-cap subset). Retrain eliminates 'cache reuse with distribution mismatch' confound (perplexity ★★★).

stage2_conditional_alpha.regularization: L1 with alpha selected via 3-fold expanding-window nested CV on non-mega-cap train pool with 60-day embargo
stage2_conditional_alpha.fit_strategy: single global model fitted on non-mega-cap subset of cached feature frame, target_transform='rank'
stage2_conditional_alpha.cv_objective: argmin mean fold MSE on rank-transformed target
stage2_conditional_alpha.training_universe_filter: drop rows where mkt_cap_at_asof in top-10% percentile per asof

params_frozen.feature_construction_unchanged: All 10 features identical to v3-v5. Cached parquet at ~/.alphalens/feature_cache/alt_data_features_de036dd57f581d40.parquet reused; only POST-cache filter (mkt-cap percentile) applied before Lasso fit.

mkt_cap_at_asof_computation.shares_source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts via latest_shares_as_of() (existing PIT-correct infra used in v4 SI%)
mkt_cap_at_asof_computation.close_source: HistoryStore close_as_of(ticker, asof, lookback=5) (existing PIT-correct infra)
mkt_cap_at_asof_computation.missing_data_policy: NaN mkt_cap → ticker RETAINED in long pool (absence-of-evidence ≠ evidence-of-absence)
mkt_cap_at_asof_computation.filter_rule: drop rows where mkt_cap_at_asof rank-percentile within asof < 0.10 (i.e., top 10%)

target_definition.post_hoc_attribution: Carhart-4F regression of (long_only_return − MDY_return) on Mkt-RF/SMB/HML/MOM with subtract_rf=False

portfolio_construction.ranking: predicted score per (ticker, asof) from rank-trained Lasso fitted on non-mega-cap train pool
portfolio_construction.long_eligibility: post-ADV cross-section AND mkt_cap_at_asof NOT in top-10% percentile at asof
portfolio_construction.benchmark_primary: MDY (SPDR S&P MidCap 400 ETF, cap-matched mid-cap)
portfolio_construction.benchmark_secondary_descriptive: SPY (continuity vs v5; NOT gating verdict)
portfolio_construction.universe: AlphaLens PIT universe filtered post-ADV minus top-10% mkt-cap

cost_model.applied_to: 30 bps round-trip per rebalance (long leg only, UNCHANGED from v5)

statistical_inference.carhart_regression: Carhart-4F with subtract_rf=False on (long_only - MDY) excess return series

anti_overfit_constraints.no_post_hoc_universe_tuning: top-10% percentile LOCKED. Tuning cutoff to observed result (e.g., switching to 5% or 15%) post-run = HARKing flexibility, forbidden.
anti_overfit_constraints.no_post_hoc_benchmark_swap: MDY locked as primary; SPY descriptive only.
anti_overfit_constraints.no_post_hoc_lasso_hyperparameter_tuning: λ chosen via CV; no manual override.
anti_overfit_constraints.exploratory_only: PASS verdict requires fresh-OOS walk-forward replication; no claim of confirmatory result possible from v6a-revised on burnt holdout alone.

params_frozen.differences_from_v5: TWO settled-as-different variables: (1) selection universe (full → drop top-10% mkt-cap); (2) Lasso retrained on subset train pool. Plus benchmark change (SPY → MDY) reflects fundamental methodological correction post-zen-review.

gate_1_mkt_cap_sanity.trigger: verify top-10% by mkt_cap_at_asof at recent holdout date includes expected mega-caps
gate_1_mkt_cap_sanity.fail_condition: any of the 10 expected names NOT in top-50 → mkt_cap calc broken, ABORT

gate_2_subset_coverage.trigger: count holdout asofs with non-mega-cap pool ≥30 (decile ≥3)
gate_2_subset_coverage.fail_condition: less than 90 of 94 holdout asofs meet threshold → ABORT (cross-section too sparse)

gate_3_lasso_refit_smoke.trigger: fit Lasso on filtered train pool (~199k rows), inspect chosen λ and nonzero coef count
gate_3_lasso_refit_smoke.fail_condition: 0 nonzero coefs (zero-coef structural artifact) → ABORT Phase B as guaranteed FAIL

gate_4_subset_rank_ic.trigger: compute holdout mean per-asof rank-IC restricted to non-mega-cap subset using REFITTED Lasso scores
gate_4_subset_rank_ic.fail_condition: rank-IC ≤ 0 → ABORT Phase B as guaranteed FAIL (population-level signal absent in subset)
gate_4_subset_rank_ic.note: perplexity Q4 warning: rank-IC > 0 doesn't guarantee α-t-stat passes; useful early-stop only on negative outcomes

periods.rationale: Identical to v3-v5. Burnt holdout invariant. Polygon SI history starts 2017-12-29. Cache parquet exists for full universe; mkt-cap filter applied post-cache load.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F alpha t-stat (HAC=5) on (long_only_return - MDY_return) holdout series
success_criteria.bonferroni_threshold_romano_wolf_adjuste: true effective m≈50 (incl preprocessing variants, model class iterations) → |t|≥3.5 PRIMARY
success_criteria.pass_rule_primary: Holdout (long − MDY) Carhart-4F α t-stat ≥ 3.5 AND Lo-adjusted Sharpe (net) ≥ 0.5 AND α annualized ≥ 3% AND MaxDD ≥ -25% AND in-CV mean rank-IR ≥ 0.5 AND ≥1 Lasso nonzero coef AND holdout mean per-asof rank-IC > 0 (restricted to non-mega-cap subset)
success_criteria.pass_rule_stretch: primary PASS conditions AND α t-stat ≥ 4.0

verdict_classification.robust_exploratory_positive: primary PASS + stretch PASS → 'directional positive on non-mega-cap subset, robust to conservative multiplicity; MUST replicate on prospective walk-forward 2026-05-01+ at p<0.05 unadjusted before any capital escalation'
verdict_classification.directional_exploratory_positive: primary PASS + stretch FAIL → 'directional positive consistent with primary gate but not robust to conservative multiplicity; informational only'
verdict_classification.fail: any primary gate FAIL → standard FAIL ledger entry, increment program count to n=13, next test |t|≥2.86 naive Bonferroni

success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy OFF-TABLE regardless of any verdict per burnt-holdout policy. Exploratory frame requires prospective walk-forward replication on data accruing post-2026-04-30 at unadjusted p<0.05 single-test before any escalation.
success_criteria.fail_rule: anything not clearing primary → FAIL, log to ledger
success_criteria.regime_stratification_postdoc: DESCRIPTIVE: report excess vs MDY for 2024-04-30 → 2024-12-31 / 2025 full / 2026-01-01 → 2026-04-30 sub-periods. Report (long − SPY) for v5 comparability.
